summary_en: 25,000,000 shares (9.50% of issued shares), ¥5,000M upper limit, execution window June 1, 2026 – May 31, 2027, method: ToSTNeT-3 and open-market purchase. Buyback authorized under Articles 156 and 165(3) of the Companies Act. Board decision aligns with the 2024–2026 Medium-Term Plan targeting cumulative shareholder returns exceeding ¥200B.
title_en: Notice regarding Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Own Shares
translation_en_brief: On May 29, 2026, Koito Manufacturing's board resolved to acquire up to 25,000,000 of its own shares for an aggregate maximum of ¥5,000M. The shares represent 9.50% of issued shares (excluding treasury stock). Execution window spans June 1, 2026 through May 31, 2027, using Tokyo Stock Exchange ToSTNeT-3 (off-market auction) and open-market purchase methods. The authorization is granted under Articles 156 and 165(3) of the Companies Act. The acquisition sits within the company's stated policy of sustainable business investment combined with enhanced shareholder returns; specifically, it is framed as an execution mechanism for the Medium-Term Plan (2024–2026) which targets cumulative shareholder distributions exceeding ¥200B over the three-year period. The board delegates day-to-day execution authority to the representative director or his designee.
